name: MAW Dark Utility
description: Cool slate dark skin for setup, admin, and single-record utility layouts. The anchor theme and ultimate fallback for the whole doc-set. Tokens lifted verbatim from the maw-budget GLOBAL_Settings layout (was provisional inline, now canonical here).

fmpMapping.note: Corresponds to the 'MAW Dark' FileMaker theme in the built solution. Per-role FMP style names not yet catalogued; add them here as the solution's object styles are named so render and build stay in agreement.
